subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and firm friend! Thy blessed letter was received, and its contents bespoke the utmost devotion and earnest supplication [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار ثابت راسخ نامه مبارک شما رسید مضمون نهایت تبتل بود و غایت تضرع از
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
